feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP Security
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP Security Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Condition Contract Pricing Procedure
entry.content:
How the Pricing Procedure was picked in Condition Contract. Whenever I am creating Condition Contract Settlement, for Delta Accruals it took Pricing Procedure A17006 and for Settlement A17J05.

How can I assign customized pricing procedure what I created.

entry.title: BTP Audit Log Viewer Error
entry.content:
Hi,

When i Check Audit log Viewer then it showing error with blank page.

entry.title: Security role in manage Trading Partner Management
entry.content:
Hi ,

What is the security role to manage Trading Partner Management in production in shot non development to update identifiers and other configurations which are specific to tenant. I see role "AuthGroup_IntegrationDeveloper" but this will enable all objects as editable we is not ideal . kindly suggest.

Regards

Vijay

entry.title: which approch is best TASK ,ENABLER,MASTER,DERIVED ,POSITION ,JOB
entry.content:
Hi ,

SAP will define some procedures like task ,enabler,master,derived,position roles, which is the 

best approch which is recommended by sap

entry.title: Authentication using XSUAA in a flutter app
entry.content: What is the right way for enable XSUAA in a flutter based app?

entry.title: How to activate a User from User Management of SAP BTP HANA Cloud Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi,

In my SAP BTP HANA Cloud Cockpit --> User & Role management, currently one user is in 'deactivated' state and because of it we are not able to perform CRUD operations on SAP HANA Cloud Tables. Kindly guide me how to activate this user.

Thanks.

entry.title: [R] - Error message while accessing Project control - enterprise projects.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are getting the below error screen " project control- enterprise project application" after the upgrade 2402 in Quality system. We are in progress of regression testing and need to complete at the earliest.

According to roles and catalogs everything looks fine. Could you please help us on this error. Please let me know if you need some more information.

 

Thanks,

Suhas.

entry.title: Saya belum menerima wang dana saya
entry.content: Kenapa saya tidak mendapat wang dana saya

entry.title: BTP Alerts when a new BTP role is created in CF
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using API we are creating/deleting a role in BTP CF. Is it possible to trigger btp alerts instance whenever a role is created or deleted?

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: Gateway connection created
entry.content:
we have issue with Gateway connection from Rep server to Ase server.

when we login to rep server and execute the ("connect to rssd") statement, we were able to connect to Ase server without any issues.

we are facing the issue while we are trying to establish the connection thru JDBC. As soon as, ("connect to rssd") statement is executed, it is throwing error as gateway connection created and getting terminated. ( if we execute only replication commands (admin who) without connect statement it is working)

is there any approach for JDBC connection?

is there any thing we have to mention in interface file?

is there any this change in connection string ?

entry.title: Getting Duplicates in the output
entry.content:
Hi there,

I wrote and executed the below query but it is fetching duplicate values as well. Kindly let me know what changes i need to do to get the unique results. I mean am i using any wrong tables in joining condition. I even tried INNER join still getting the same... PFA 

QUERY I USED :

select DISTINCT top(2000) MARA.MATNR, BKPF.BUKRS, MSEG.WERKS, T001L.LGORT, BKPF.GJAHR, MSEG.BWART,
MKPF.XBLNR,
MSEG.DMBTR,
MSEG.MENGE,
MKPF.BUDAT,
MKPF.XABLN,
MBEW.PEINH,
MARD.LABST,
T156T.BTEXT
FROM MARA
INNER  JOIN MSEG ON MSEG.MANDT=MARA.MANDT AND MSEG.MATNR=MARA.MATNR
INNER  JOIN BKPF ON BKPF.MANDT = MSEG.MANDT AND BKPF.BUKRS = MSEG.BUKRS
INNER  JOIN T001L ON T001L.MANDT = MSEG.MANDT AND T001L.WERKS = MSEG.WERKS AND T001L.LGORT = MSEG.LGORT
INNER  JOIN MKPF ON MKPF.MANDT = BKPF.MANDT AND MKPF.MBLNR = BKPF.BELNR
INNER  JOIN MBEW ON MBEW.MANDT=MSEG.MANDT AND MBEW.BWTAR=MSEG.BWTAR
INNER   JOIN MARD ON MARD.MANDT=MBEW.MANDT AND MARD.LFGJA = MBEW.LFGJA
INNER JOIN T156T ON T156T.MANDT=MSEG.MANDT  AND T156T.KZZUG=MSEG.KZZUG
WHERE MARA.MANDT ='500' AND
MARA.MATNR='1L90MBUS3.6/250' AND MSEG.WERKS='VNSD'AND BKPF.GJAHR='2022'  AND T156T.SPRAS='E';

entry.title: SSO RISE SAP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

my client is looking for implementing SSO in SAPGUI in a RISE Cloud Solution by using Secure Login Service through SAP IAS.

After taking a look through several SAP articles and guides on internet, I have nor been able to locate a clear guide to implement such a solution.

May any of you have access to a document or something similar to guide me through this process?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Principal Propagation with API Management & On-Premise System
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to set up Principal Propagation with API Management capability of Integration Suite to an On-Premise SAP System. I am following this blog to achieve the same.

I have setup and tested the Principal Propagation between my subaccount and the backend system via Cloud Connector. It seems to work fine. 

But when I try to expose an API from the system and try to test it, it says "403 - Forbidden". I am not able to troubleshoot the issue. I followed all the steps in the blog from creating instances, service keys to adding policy templates but I am not sure what is missing.

Can someone please throw some light on this? Would highly appreciate.

@shruthiarjun

entry.title: SAP BTP Deploy Error in CAP Project
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I got error in Deploying the Cap project in Business Application Studio . #SAP CAP

entry.title: Error (Error retrieving service instances) in BTP, when I try to create a new destination.
entry.content:
When I try to create a new destination in my BTP sub-account and want to select and existion ServiceInstance, I get the following error message: "Error retrieving service instances".

Can somebody help ?

entry.title: How can I map source field to target only when a condition field exits in that line items
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement where, I need to create "EXCP" Node only when "Place" exists in source payload (I can get multiple line items) and map "TANUM" under "EXCP" to "Work" where ever 'Place" exists. Please advice how I can achieve this.
Below are the sample payloads:

Source payload:

<RootNode>
<Parent>
<Child>
<Work>1234</Work>
<Place>HYD</Place>
<Time>01:02:03</Time>
</Child>
<Child>
<Work>5678</Work>
<Time>01:04:03</Time>
</Child>
<Child>
<Work>9012</Work>
<Place>HYD</Place>
<Time>01:02:03</Time>
</Child>
</Parent>
</RootNode>

Target Structure:

<WMTCIDOC>
<IDOC>
<EDIDC>
<EX1>1</EX1>
<EX2>1</EX2>
</EDIDC>
<EXCP> ( I need to create this only when "Place" exists in source
<TANUM></TANUM> (Need to map Work from source where "Place exists")
<ANUM></ANUM>
</EXCP>
</IDOC>
<WMTCIDOC>

Expected Target payload:

<WMTCIDOC>
<IDOC>
<EDIDC>
<EX1>1</EX1>
<EX2>1</EX2>
</EDIDC>
<EXCP> 
<TANUM>1234</TANUM> 
<ANUM>01:02:03</ANUM>
</EXCP>

<EXCP> 
<TANUM>9012</TANUM> 
<ANUM>01:02:03</ANUM>
</EXCP>

</IDOC>
<WMTCIDOC>

I'm able to achieve creating the node if "Place" exists but not able to map right "Work" to "TANUM" (TANUM is mapped sequentially).

Thanks,
Venkat

entry.title: I am not able to find " Integration_Provisioner " Role Collection. Kindly suggest
entry.content: I am not able to find " Integration_Provisioner " Role Collection. Kindly suggest

entry.title: SAP Alert Notifications when new user is created
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using API we are creating/deleting a user in BTP CF. Is it possible to trigger btp notification alerts whenever a user is deleted or created?

I have subscribed to alert notification services in subaccount. I have to define the condition in the alert notification subscription. How to define for the above scenario

Is there any doc/blog/tutorial for this? Please help

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: SAP GSOAP VERSION DISCLOSURE VULNERABILITY
entry.content:
Hello,

We are facing security issue, SAP gsoap exposes its version information during network scanning,

Any ways to hide the version related information from SAP application ?

entry.title: How to accept request param inside a custom CDS service entity
entry.content:
entity description{
language : String;
shortDescription : String;
longDescription  : String;
deleted : Boolean default false;
Books   : Association to one Books;
}
 
entity Books : cuid ,managed {
     title : String;
     author : String;
     deleted : Boolean default false;
     to_description : Composition of many description
on to_description.books = $self;
}
 
BooksService.cds
 
service BookService{
 
  entity Book as projection on Books;
 
  entity BookList as 
select 
title,
author,
to_description.shortDescription as shortDescription
 
from Book 
where deleted = false; 
}
 
 
The current implementation of the BooksService.cds returns all descriptions associated with a book when the list service is invoked. However, the requirement is to modify the service to accept a parameter, Accept-Language, which specifies the preferred language for the description. Based on this language parameter, the service should filter and return only the description that matches the specified language.
 
To achieve this, the service needs to be updated to accept the Accept-Language parameter as a request parameter. Upon receiving the request, the service should extract the language preference from the Accept-Language header and use it to filter the descriptions associated with the books. Only the description that matches the specified language should be included in the response.
 
Please provide a solution that demonstrates how to modify the BooksService to accept the Accept-Language parameter and filter descriptions based on the specified language preference.
